name: Mr Pibb Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 to 3 cups of pecan halves.
2. Cook sugars and Mr. Pibb in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (240 degrees F on a candy thermometer).
3. Remove the mixture from heat and stir in marshmallows and pecans.
4. Mix vigorously until the marshmallows dissolve.
5. Quickly drop by tablespoon onto wax paper to cool.
6. Makes 2 dozen pralines.
Note: If Mr Pibb is not available in your area, use Dr. Pepper.
